title: September
content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}} {{Month|September|hide31=yes}}
'''September''' is the ninth month of the year in the [[Wikipedia:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]. It has 30 days.

==Film releases & TV airings==
*'''Sep 7''' – [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars Droids'']] debuts in 1985.
*'''Sep 7''' – [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] debuts in 1985.
*'''Sep 12''' – [[Original unaltered trilogy|''Star Wars Trilogy: Unaltered'']] is released on DVD in 2006.
*'''Sep 21''' – ''[[Star Wars: Andor]]'' premiered on [[Disney+]] with "[[Kassa (episode)|Kassa]]," "[[That Would Be Me]]" and "[[Reckoning (episode)|Reckoning]]" in 2022
